executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Whole-stack certification blocked by external marketing owner loop — independent verification fail since 2026-06-02, distribution channels remain red, primary-repo adoption flat.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Marketing owner loop must produce fresh measurable outcome evidence and pass independent verification before whole-stack green is claimed. Architecture-owned paths are coherent.

live_last_error_details.blocked-channel-recovery: cron: job interrupted by gateway restart (transient)

findings.title: Marketing independent verification still fail — blocks whole-stack certification
findings.mechanism: Marketing independent verification fails closed. Stale since 2026-06-02 (~63h). Distribution channels: Reddit blocked, Apollo blocked, primary repo flat, measurement hold active. Marketing workflow audit reports measurement_pending.
findings.root_cause: Outcome evidence for Codeberg-primary adoption is still missing. No shipped replacement distribution path recorded.
findings.recommended_fix: Marketing owner loop must produce fresh measurable outcome evidence, ship a working distribution path, and rerun independent verification.

findings.title: Live Gateway topology clean — 21 enabled, 0 disabled
findings.mechanism: Direct live cron inspection shows coherent runtime topology with no disabled live jobs.
findings.root_cause: Runtime topology is healthy and reflects intended architecture.
findings.recommended_fix: Maintain direct cron inspection as source of truth.

findings.title: Architecture verifier path green — ok=true, no errors
findings.mechanism: Agent architecture verifier ok=true, no errors. Independent verifier qualified_pass=true. Architecture-owned gates coherent; remaining blocker correctly externalized.
findings.root_cause: Architecture-side gates are healthy — verifier, checker, and independent verifier all pass clean.
findings.recommended_fix: Continue rerunning independent verification after each material architecture artifact refresh.

findings.title: Docs quality stack green and stable
findings.mechanism: Docs verifier pass, checker DOCS_QUALITY_OK, editorial DOCS_EDITORIAL_OK, agentic pass. recent_failures=36, consecutive_passes_since_last_fail=40. Independently verified pass at 2026-06-05 04:17 UTC.
findings.root_cause: Docs loop healthy with sustained stability after earlier repair window.

findings.title: Loop 'pypi-auto-unblocker' has no self-improvement mandate in registry
findings.mechanism: Job exists in live cron topology but is not registered in self_improvement_loops.json. Status is 'ok' but no self-improvement contract exists.
findings.root_cause: Loop created without self-improvement mandate or independent verification requirement.
findings.recommended_fix: Register in self_improvement_loops.json with checker/runner/verifier scripts, or retire if unused.

findings.title: Loop 'internal-linking-watchdog' has no self-improvement mandate — also has delivery error
findings.mechanism: Job exists with last_error status (Matrix delivery target error). Not registered in self_improvement_loops.json. Two failures: architectural (no mandate) + operational (delivery broken).
findings.root_cause: Loop created without self-improvement mandate and has unhealed delivery failure.
findings.recommended_fix: Fix Matrix delivery target, then register in self_improvement_loops.json or retire.

findings.title: Open incident artifact_contract_fail has 142 repeats — previously resolved, monitor
findings.mechanism: agent_architecture_verifier::artifact_contract_fail at 142 repeats. Escalation actions recorded as resolved. Architecture verifier now passes fresh. Monitor for recurrence.
findings.root_cause: Historical incident from verifier contract gap that has been repaired.
findings.recommended_fix: If verifier stays green for 2 more watchdog runs, close incident in open_incidents_latest.json.

findings.title: last-error jobs (blocked-channel-recovery, internal-linking-watchdog) are non-blocking for architecture health
findings.mechanism: blocked-channel-recovery: gateway restart interruption (transient). internal-linking-watchdog: Matrix delivery target missing (configuration). Neither is architecture-owned.
findings.root_cause: Operational errors external to architecture loop.
findings.recommended_fix: internal-linking-watchdog needs Matrix target config fix (owner loop responsibility).

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Marketing owner loop: produce fresh measurable outcome evidence and pass independent verification
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Only remaining blocker to whole-stack green certification.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Clears external blocker and enables whole-stack pass.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Register pypi-auto-unblocker and internal-linking-watchdog in self_improvement_loops.json or retire them
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Two live jobs without self-improvement contracts violate architectural standards.
Job has last_error and no self-healing path.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Monitor artifact_contract_fail incident — close if verifier stays green for 2 more watchdog runs
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: 142-repeat incident that appears resolved but needs confirmation.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Fresh openclaw cron list --json confirmed: 21 total, 21 enabled, 0 disabled, 2 last-error (non-architecture).
Independent verifier returns ok=true, qualified_pass=true, errors only external marketing.
Verifier returns ok=true, no errors. Previously had artifact-staleness error resolved by re-running independent verify before verifier.
Wrote fresh audit with current live topology, verifier state, and ranked findings.

independent_verification.summary: Independent verification confirms the repaired architecture verifier now fails closed on stale signoff, the live loop topology/ownership checks remain green, and shared market-intelligence reuse stays machine-verifiable.

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Marketing owner loop must produce fresh measurable outcome evidence and pass independent verification.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Marketing independent verification fail since 2026-06-02
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: All distribution channels red. Primary repo flat. Measurement hold active. No shipped replacement path. This is the sole blocker to whole-stack green.

notes: Architecture green = architecture-owned verifier path coherent. Does not mean whole stack green.
Live disabled jobs: 0. No topology drift.
Marketing independent verification remains the sole whole-stack blocker.
pypi-auto-unblocker and internal-linking-watchdog are live but unregistered in self_improvement_loops.json.
